params.name: Pinocchio
params.description:
On Dec 24, 1883, famous carpenter Geppetto made puppet Pinocchio. 

Pinocchio is a marionette made by Geppetto. It wears a pointed hat, a jacket, and a pair of knee-length floral pants. When it was finished, the mischievous Pinocchio laughed at Geppetto's face and even took his wig. He wanted to be human so bad and a fairy fulfilled his wish. But she cast a spell on his short nose, saying that the nose grows whenever he lies.
